message:
test(asserts): [7k7pl batch 3] pin JSON field types in semantic_integration

Upgrade 5 presence-only `.is_some()` assertions to pin the JSON TYPE
and non-empty constraint of every documented schema field, so
regressions that emit `null` / numbers / swapped field types fail
loudly instead of slipping past "field present".

- test_models_status_json_output: model_id + state must be non-empty
  strings.
- test_models_verify_json_output: model_dir + status must be
  non-empty strings.
- test_models_check_update_json_output: update_available must be a
  boolean (CLI consumers branch on it), latest_revision must be a
  string.
- test_robot_output_schema (top level): hits must be an array,
  total_matches + limit must be non-negative integers.
- test_robot_output_schema (hit fields): content, agent, source_path,
  match_type must all be strings.

Verified green on all 11 models tests + test_robot_output_schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
